_publications._publicationTitle: Characterisation of malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumours in neurofibromatosis-1 using heterogeneity analysis of

_contextSnippet: On 1.5-h scans, there was a significant difference between benign and malignant tumours for all SUV and other first-order parameters, for none of the second-order parameters and for all four high-order parameters
details: Successfully used for heterogeneity analysis calculations, enabling discrimination between benign and malignant tumours with various texture parameters showing significant differences
